description_long: This object is a discarded, cylindrical can with an octagonal cross-section, featuring a weathered white exterior. The top surface is metallic and appears slightly corroded, with a rough, gray texture. Pink liquid stains are visible, having dripped down from the rim on multiple sides, suggesting the can once contained a colored beverage or paint. The body of the can shows signs of wear, including smudges, scratches, and small patches of grime, indicating it has been exposed to the elements. There are no visible brand logos, text, or barcodes on the surface. The can is closed at the top, with no visible pull tab or opening mechanism.
description: A weathered, white octagonal can with pink liquid stains dripping from the rim and a rough, metallic top. The surface is scratched and dirty, showing signs of outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Front view shows prominent pink liquid drips down the white can, with a rough, gray metallic top and some surface grime.
description_view_1: This side view reveals mostly plain white surface with minor black smudges and only a hint of pink at the rim.
description_view_2: Another side view with visible pink drips, less pronounced than the front, and some faint surface marks.
description_view_3: Back view displays a large black smudge and pink stains at the rim, with the drips less defined than the front.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Surface scratches, black smudges, and grime are visible on the can's body, especially on the back and sides. No major dents or rust.
